docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THAM JOYCE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $183.84 FILED BY FONG DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT THAM JOYCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONG DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THAM JOYCE $183.84 PRINCIPAL, $18.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $201.84, PLTF D FONG IS REQUIRED NOW AND IN THE FUTURE TO GIVE 24HRS NOTICE TO DEFT PRIOR TO ENTERING APT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED
